sentence: 农民每天都要给鸡喂饲料。
pinyin: Nóngmín měi tiān dōu yào gěi jī wèi sìliào.
english: Farmers have to feed fodder to the chickens every day.

sentence: 每个公民都有纳税的义务。
pinyin: Měi gè gōng mín dōu yǒu nà shuì de yì wù.
english: Every citizen has the obligation to pay taxes.

meaning: 1. to fill in a form; 2. to write data in a box (on a questionnaire or
sentence: 请填写这张表格，然后交给前台。
pinyin: Qǐng tián xiě zhè zhāng biǎo gé, rán hòu jiāo gěi qián tái.
english: Please fill in this form and hand it to the front desk.

sentence: 他写了一封公开信说明情况。
pinyin: Tā xiě le yī fēng gōng kāi xìn shuō míng qíng kuàng.
english: He wrote an open letter to explain the situation.

meaning: (of a guard, sentry etc) to come off duty; (of a worker) be to laid of
sentence: 他下岗后开了一家小餐馆。
pinyin: Tā xià gǎng hòu kāi le yī jiā xiǎo cān guǎn.
english: After being laid off, he opened a small restaurant.
